package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_model_contains_calculated_response_fields: Persistence structs that carry API-only derived presentation fields.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule062NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule062NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule062NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario062Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule062NegativeService, input Rule062NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
